findings.text: NAP-SRC-0053 extracted via pdftotext with 85% confidence; no OCR engine used.
NAP-SRC-0055 extracted via pdftotext with 85% confidence; no OCR engine used.
Both sources lack OCR enhancement; Tesseract or similar could improve coverage and confidence.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Run Tesseract OCR on the PDF files for NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055 to improve text extraction coverage and confidence. Compare output with existing pdftotext extraction and flag any discrepancies or additional content recovered.
proposed_tasks.title: Run Tesseract OCR on NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055

summary: Evaluated extracted text from NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055. Both sources were extracted via pdftotext with 85% confidence; no OCR engine was used. The extracted text appears largely readable but may contain OCR gaps or formatting loss. Proposed follow-up OCR task using Tesseract to improve coverage and confidence.

uncertainties.reason: OCR engine was null for both sources; text extraction may miss embedded images or non-standard fonts.
